tinker.name: Image Cropper
tinker.description: Image cropper with rotation, flipping, and aspect ratio controls

zh-CN.name: 图片裁剪
zh-CN.description: 图片裁剪，支持旋转、翻转和宽高比控制

open_image.description: Open an image file in the editor. Same as opening a file in the UI. Returns image size and metadata needed before cropping.

path.description: Absolute path to a PNG, JPG, JPEG, or WebP image

get_image.description: Get the currently open image info, including width, height, file path, and save state.

crop_image.description: Crop the currently open image with a rectangular region. Call open_image first to load the file and read its dimensions.

x.description: Crop region left offset in pixels

y.description: Crop region top offset in pixels

resize_image.description: Resize the currently open image to new dimensions. Same as the resize dialog in the UI. Call open_image first to read the current size.

keepAspectRatio.description: When true, provide width or height alone to scale proportionally.

save_image.description: Save the current edited image after cropping or resizing. Same as clicking save in the UI.

overwriteOriginal.description: When true, save overwrites the original file. When false, outputPath is required.

outputPath.description: Absolute path to save the cropped image when overwriteOriginal is false.
